scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && cross-env INPUT=cocktail-recipe-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=liked-cocktails-widget.html vite build
scripts.watch: cross-env INPUT=cocktail-recipe-widget.html vite build --watch && cross-env INPUT=liked-cocktails-widget.html vite build --watch
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.start:production: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run build && npm run serve:production
scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently 'npm run watch' 'npm run serve'
